title: A Surge In New Patent Applications Filed By Semiconductor Companies Signals Upcoming Tech Innovation Bursts
thesis: An unusual weekly increase in semiconductor-related patent filings often precedes accelerated product releases and revenue growth. Technology sector ETFs, especially semiconductor-heavy ones, benefit from innovation cycles driven by new patents.
signal_logic: If weekly patent filings for semiconductor companies increase by over 20% compared to the previous 4-week average
entry_exit: Entry: If weekly patent filings for semiconductor companies increase by over 20% compared to the previous 4-week average Exit: After 15 trading days or if weekly filings fall below the previous 4-week average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use USPTO Patent Application Bulk Data via api (weekly).

schema.idea: A surge in new patent applications filed by semiconductor companies signals upcoming tech innovation bursts.
schema.behavior: An unusual weekly increase in semiconductor-related patent filings often precedes accelerated product releases and revenue growth.

market_impact.rationale: Technology sector ETFs, especially semiconductor-heavy ones, benefit from innovation cycles driven by new patents.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly patent filings for semiconductor companies increase by over 20% compared to the previous 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 15 trading days or if weekly filings fall below the previous 4-week average
